title: Chat UI: streaming markdown with inline tool-call cards
userStory: As Steve, I want a usable mobile-first chat UI so that the PWA actually feels like an app.
acceptanceCriteria: pwa/src/routes/+page.svelte renders an auto-grow textarea and Send button (Enter to send)
Streaming markdown rendered with marked + a code highlighter
Tool calls shown inline as collapsed cards (e.g. 'search_brain("...")') with results dropdown
Mobile-first: respects safe-area insets and virtual keyboard handling
Verify: a streamed response with a tool call renders the card and reveals results on tap
